description_long: This is a simple rectangular wooden table with a flat, smooth top and two wide, flat side panels serving as legs. The table has a natural light wood grain finish, giving it a clean and modern appearance. The legs are positioned at the ends of the tabletop, providing stable support and a minimalist silhouette. There are no visible drawers, handles, or decorative elements, emphasizing its utilitarian design. The edges and corners are straight and unembellished, contributing to its functional and contemporary look. This table would be suitable for use in public spaces such as libraries, parks, or urban waiting areas.
description: A minimalist rectangular wooden table with a smooth, light wood grain finish and two wide, flat side legs. The design is clean, modern, and functional.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full tabletop and both wide, flat side legs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile of the tabletop and the full width of one leg.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, showing the tabletop and both legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with the narrow tabletop and one leg visible.
